control_definition: Healthy or adjacent normal liver tissue
comparison_label: Paper-disclosed multi-cohort liver-cancer discovery pool used in the CDK20 study
inclusion_rule_summary: This record mirrors the 10 cohorts explicitly listed in the CDK20 paper, even though the public pool is heterogeneous.
exclusion_rule_summary: Do not let AlphaFold targetability, Chemistry42 generation, or later biochemical assays leak into the discovery contrast. Do not assume every cohort is adult HCC versus healthy liver.
leakage_risks: Target-discovery evidence must stay separate from later chemistry success.
Adjacent-normal tissue may not be equivalent to healthy liver across all cohorts.
The public cohort pool includes hepatoblastoma and mixed liver-disease comparisons.

provenance.notes: The paper gives aggregate sample totals across these cohorts, but the public accessions reveal disease-definition heterogeneity that makes this unsuitable as a clean HCC-only contrast.
